MINI MINUTES FOR APR-26-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHIFTS THE BURDEN BASED UPON THE DECLARATION OF BRANDY FORD, AND DEFENDANT FAILED TO FILE ANY OPPOSITION. DEFENDANT IS LIABLE TO PLAINTIFF FOR THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $12,417.72 AND COSTS OF $994 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $13,411.72. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $650.61 INTEREST, $80.95 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Set For Case Management Conference On Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Plaintiff shifts the burden based upon the declaration of Brandy Ford, and defendant failed to file any opposition. Defendant is liable to plaintiff for the principal sum of $12,417.72 and costs of $994 for a total judgment of $13,411.72. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Set For Trial On May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
